Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (124 Lakeview Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for (administrator) Bernadette Burnett who is present in court.

The sale was confirmed at $652,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $610,000.00 is required.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for (administrator) Bernadette Burnett.
This matter had been pre-granted, Ms. Baer appeared to advise the court that she had received notice of an objection filed the previous day.

The Court confirmed that the register of actions showed that the filings were now listed, stated that the court has not seen them nor has Ms. Baer had an opportunity to respond. Ms. Baer stated that if the objectors had called her she could have explained, stated that the only remaining issue is the sale of real property, that the property is currently vacant and cleaned, that they had a listing agreement, that there is an issue in that the city does not see the permit for construction and will have to come out, that she has the document showing that the property is listed and presented the court with a copy of what was filed. The Court stated that it should not take 6 months to sell the property and Ms. Baer agreed. The Court stated that it will approve and continue the status report through August 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Baer stated that the sale will require court confirmation and that it cannot go on the market until the city approves the permit.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)
